mapper.select: SELECT choice_id, problem_id, choice_label, choice_text, is_correct, sort_order FROM problem_choices WHERE choice_id = #{id}
SELECT choice_id, problem_id, choice_label, choice_text, is_correct, sort_order FROM problem_choices ORDER BY choice_id DESC
SELECT choice_id, problem_id, choice_label, choice_text, is_correct, sort_order FROM problem_choices WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_choices ( problem_id, choice_label, choice_text, is_correct, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{problemId}, #{choiceLabel}, #{choiceText}, #{isCorrect}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE problem_choices SET problem_id = #{problemId}, choice_label = #{choiceLabel}, choice_text = #{choiceText}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE choice_id = #{choiceId}
